content_blocks.text: চতুর্থ অধ্যায়**Income-tax Ordinance, 1984 (Ord. No. XXXVI of 1984) এর সংশোধন**
**Ordinance No. XXXVI of 1984 এর section 16E এর বিলোপ।**—উক্ত Ordinance এর section 16E বিলুপ্ত হইবে।

content_blocks.stitching_note: Continues into the next page with sub-clauses (b) and (c).

output_carry_forward_state.active_point_summary: Insertion of new section 19BBBBB in Ordinance No. XXXVI of 1984, detailing special tax treatment for residential building/apartment investment, starting with sub-clause (a).
output_carry_forward_state.continuation_hint: The point continues with sub-clauses (b) and (c) detailing tax rates for different areas.
output_carry_forward_state.last_visible_text: (i) taka five thousand per square meter in the case of a building or apartment the plinth area of which does not exceed two hundred square meter;
